name: eyelock-assistants
description: Harnesses, plugins, and skills for development workflows, media management, and conversational alignment.

scripts.changeset:version: changeset version && node scripts/sync-manifests.mjs writeback && node scripts/sync-manifests.mjs generate
scripts.lint: biome check && ynd lint && ynd validate
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write && ynd lint && ynd validate
scripts.check: pnpm sync-manifests:check && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm lint:spell
